case_title: JENNIFER MARTIN VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MARTIN, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE SERVED MAY-19-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTIN, JENNIFER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $4,075.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,150.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-06-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-06-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE, JOYCELYN PEREZ, LEGAL ASSISTANT FOR THE CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. COPY OF THE NOTICE DENYING PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM BY THE CITY ATTORNEY''S OFFICE WAS PROVIDED TO THE COURT AT TODAY'S HEARING. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2016 - JUDGMENT.
